chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1353 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 5468/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 5469/25 4.For hearing of main case 09-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Salam Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that after curing some defects he will file a fresh petition. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
